hooks.command: bash -c 'file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))"); case "$file" in *.env|*/.env) echo "Blocked: .env contains live credentials — edit .env.example instead" >&2; exit 1;; esac'

bash -c 'file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))"); echo "$file" | grep -qE "lore/.*\.py$" && python -m pytest -x -q 2>&1 | tail -20 || true'
